programmes.show_description: 25 of the greatest rock bands of the noughties featuring Paramore, Bullet For My Valentine, Slipknot and My Chemical Romance.
Turn it up to 11 for the finest rock anthems! Featuring Kings Of Leon, The Killers, Green Day, Biffy Clyro & The Foo Fighters. This is Now Rock!
These are the legendary rock stars that made the 80s! Expect Meat Loaf, Bonnie Tyler, Queen, Bon Jovi, AC/DC, Iron Maiden & loads more!
An hour of Anthems and the biggest rock songs from rock legends ACDC!
Number 1 rock songs from the last 50 years! With mega hits from the Arctic Monkeys & KOL right back to legends like The Stones & T.Rex!
Nicky Horne presents his favourite songs behind 30 of the greatest rock album covers ever! Featuring The Beatles & Queen, The Stones & Pink Floyd.
Number 1 rock songs from the last 50 years! With mega hits from the Arctic Monkeys & KOL right back to legends like The Stones & T.Rex!
20 epic songs loaded with mega hair energy & power chords! From 80s rock icons Boston, Whitesnake & Chicago to modern day heroes The Darkness, Green Day & My Chemical Romance.
In order of release and kicking off in 1978, 99 Alternative Rock Anthems featuring Midnight Oil, Jesus Jones, U2, Radiohead, Blink, The Offspring and Paramore.
Number 1 rock songs from the last 50 years! With mega hits from the Arctic Monkeys & KOL right back to legends like The Stones & T.Rex!
T'Pau's Carol Decker with 30 years of the most amazing women who ROCK! From Grace Slick in the 60s to Florence Welch in the 00s - these ladies all left an incredible mark.
The Biggest Ballads from the royals of rock! From Queen, Bon Jovi & Whitesnake to Meat Loaf, Nickleback & Evanescence.
Guitar heavy laid-back tracks & big power ballads - but every song has a huge chorus! Expect plenty of Fleetwood Mac, Foreigner, Pat Benatar & U2.
The Biggest Ballads from the royals of rock! From Queen, Bon Jovi & Whitesnake to Meat Loaf, Nickleback & Evanescence.
One hour of pure laid back tracks and big power ballads from the 80s, every song with a huge chorus! Expect plenty of Foreigner, Toto, U2 and Heart.
The Biggest Ballads from the royals of rock! From Queen, Bon Jovi & Whitesnake to Meat Loaf, Nickleback & Evanescence.
From our sister channel NOW 90s, 2 hours of songs that wouldn't have sounded out of place on Simon's 'Our Tune' slot on Radio 1 in the 90s. Including Chris Isaak & Jeff Buckley.
An hour of Anthems and the biggest rock songs from 90s rock legends Bon Jovi!
in order, the rock anthems that claimed the top 3 in the first decade of this century. From Limp Bizkit in 2000 to Kasabian in 2009!
Turn it up to 11 for the finest rock anthems! Featuring Kings Of Leon, The Killers, Green Day, Biffy Clyro & The Foo Fighters. This is Now Rock!
Turn up your speakers to 11 and live life even louder! Emo Anthems in order from Linkin Park in 2000 to The My Chemical Romance at the end of the Decade!
A decade of mega hits and the loudest anthems! Expect Biffy Clyro, Linkin Park, Blink 182, Evanescence, Fall Out Boy & loads more!
These rebellious teens rocked every college campus throughout the 90s and 00s. Expect great tunes from Blink-182, Wheatus, Good Charlotte and many more!
Starting in the 00s, bow before the royal rock stage! Home to the best front men and leading ladies that the world of rock has produced!
A decade of mega hits and the loudest anthems! Expect Biffy Clyro, Linkin Park, Blink 182, Evanescence, Fall Out Boy & loads more!
The most fabulous glam rock icons from the satin & glitter of 70s through to the bold new look of today. Glam Rock never left us, it just changed outfits!
Number 1 rock songs from the last 50 years! With mega hits from the Arctic Monkeys & KOL right back to legends like The Stones & T.Rex!
